title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 477.070 - Territorial jurisdiction of the western district court of appeals
text:
477.070.  Territorial jurisdiction of the western district court of appeals. — The jurisdiction of the western district of the court of appeals shall be coextensive with all the counties in the state except those embraced in the jurisdiction of the eastern and the southern districts of the court of appeals.
(RSMo 1939 § 2061, A.L. 1973 S.B. 263, A.L. 1978 H.B. 1634) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1897; 1919 § 2393; 1909 § 3915 
Effective 1-02-79
